catalog_content:
Item Name: Maine Coast Sea Vegetables Organic Dulse Flakes | Seaweed Snacks | Rich in Iodine, Protein & Minerals | Harvested from North Atlantic | Great for Salads, Soup & Smoothies | 4 oz (Pack of 1) Bullet Point 1: Naturally Flavorful & Nutrient-Rich: Harvested from the pristine waters of the North Atlantic, these organic dulse flakes bring a naturally mild, slightly salty, and umami-rich taste to your meals; Its chopped texture makes it easy to use as a salad seasoning, in soups, or as a seaweed salt alternative; Perfect for those who enjoy natural, wholesome ingredients in their daily cooking Bullet Point 2: Pure & Organic Ingredients: Made from Palmaria palmata, our dulse flakes are wild-harvested and carefully solar-dried to preserve their natural goodness; This organic sea vegetable is packed with iodine, iron, potassium, and other essential minerals; This product is Certified Organic by OCIA; A trusted choice for those who prefer clean-label, plant-based nutrition without additives or preservatives Bullet Point 3: Versatile & Easy to Use: A simple way to add a nutritious twist to everyday meals! Sprinkle these flakes on soups, salads, and grain bowls or mix them into smoothies and homemade dressings; Use as a salt alternative in low-sodium recipes, or blend into spice mixes for an umami boost; Perfect for vegan, keto, and paleo-friendly diets Bullet Point 4: Great for Everyday Meals: Perfect for home cooks, professional chefs, and anyone looking for an easy seasoning option; Whether you're meal prepping, cooking family dinners, or adding a final touch to your plate, these flakes work seamlessly; Keep a jar at home or take it with you for quick, nutritious seasoning anytime Bullet Point 5: Annually Tested for Quality & Safety: Our seaweeds undergo annual testing to ensure you receive a high-quality product you can trust; Some of our MCSV’s seaweeds carry California’s Prop 65 warning due to their potential to absorb elements from their environment; This warning serves as a consumer ‘right to know’ notice rather than an indication of safety; California’s consumption thresholds are based on the assumption of consuming a full serving daily Bullet Point 6: Package Contents: 1 Unit of Maine Coast Sea Vegetables Dulse Flakes - 4 oz (113g) Product Description:

Maine Coast Sea Vegetables Organic Dulse (Palmaria palmata) Flakes are nutrient-rich and wild-sourced from the North Atlantic Ocean. These certified organic dulse flakes are packed with iodine, protein, and essential minerals, making them a flavorful and healthy umami seasoning. Ideal as a natural salt alternative, this sea vegetable blends effortlessly into salads, soups, smoothies, and various dishes. Sustainably harvested and certified organic by OCIA, this dried seaweed is a clean, plant-based option for health-conscious consumers. Whether used as a salad seasoning, seaweed salt, or in spice blends, these dried vegetable flakes provide an easy way to add ocean-derived nutrition to your meals.


Maine Coast Sea Vegetables Dulse Flakes Features:

  • Certified organic, wild-harvested, and sustainably sourced.
  • Carefully solar-dried at mild temperatures to preserve enzymes, nutrients, and protect the environment.
  • No need to cook; dulse is delicious and nutritious when eaten raw
  • Packed with more protein and dietary fiber than most other sea and land vegetables
  • A good source of essential nutrients including vitamin A (beta-carotene), iron, potassium, magnesium, chlorophyll, trace ocean minerals, and B vitamins.
  • Provides a natural umami flavor without additives.


Who are we: Founded in 1971, Maine Coast Sea Vegetables began with a passion for wild-harvested North Atlantic sea vegetables and has grown into a trusted, employee-owned company. Based in Hancock, Maine, we are committed to sustainability, quality, and transparency, carefully selecting organic-certified harvest grounds and rigorously testing. Our sea vegetables are minimally processed, dried at low temperatures, and hand-graded to preserve their natural nutrients. With a dedication to honesty, accountability, and community education, we continue to provide nutrient-rich, responsibly sourced seaweed to customers across the U.S. and Canada.

Value: 4.0 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium organic seaweed product positioned as a health-focused, nutrient-dense ingredient with strong sustainability credentials. The brand’s long-standing reputation for quality, combined with certifications and natural ingredient claims, supports a mid-to-high price point. Small 4 oz packaging suggests targeted use as a specialty seasoning rather than a bulk commodity, with perceived value tied to organic certification, protein content, and unique umami flavor profile.
